B1: Ana, First-time Traveler in Slovenia

This page is an older duplicate for this story and level. Open the current canonical version.

Source topic: Discovering Slovenia: Mountains, Lakes, Caves, and Coastal Towns

Quality checked lesson

A practical B1 travel guide lesson that helps learners understand Slovenia through concrete places, transport, food, and planning decisions.
